arts.ttl: Watch Chelsea vs PSG in Club World Cup final for free on UK TV and live stream
arts.sum: Chelsea are one game away from their second trophy of the season, with Enzo Maresca's side facing 90 gruelling minutes against Paris Saint-Germain in New Jersey

arts.ttl: Chelsea v PSG live: Underdog Blues try to make history in Club World Cup final against European champions
arts.sum: Chelsea have a golden opportunity to become world champions this evening but there is a pretty big obstacle in their way, in the form of Champions League winners Paris Saint-Germain.

arts.ttl: Police on high alert in France for PSG vs. Chelsea Club World Cup final in US
arts.sum: French officials have warned that no fan misbehavior will be tolerated after violence in the country marred celebrations of PSG winning its first Champions League trophy in Germany. Tens of thousands of police officers will be deployed in France on Sunday night as Paris Saint-Germain takes on Chelsea in the Club World Cup final thousands of miles away in the United States.

arts.ttl: Meet Michael Buffer, the legendary ring announcer introducing Chelsea and PSG players at the Club World Cup final
arts.sum: Buffer has also announced for the MLB World Series, Stanley Cup Finals, NBA Finals, NFL playoff games, and even the Indianapolis 500 and has appeared as himself in numerous films (including the Rocky and Creed series, Ready to Rumble, Dumbo) and TV shows (The Simpsons, Phineas and Ferb). Buffer has an instantly recognizable announcing style, which includes rolling certain letters and adding unique inflections to a fighter’s name all topped off with his iconic and trademarked catchphrase: “Let’s get ready to rumble!”

arts.ttl: How to watch Chelsea v PSG on TV tonight for free in Club World Cup final
arts.sum: Chelsea face PSG in the inaugural Club World Cup final tonight

arts.ttl: How to watch Chelsea vs PSG in Club World Cup final for FREE and on UK TV
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca's Chelsea will do battle with Champions League winners Paris Saint-Germain in New Jersey for Club World Cup glory, and the match will be free to air for fans in the UK

arts.ttl: PSG XI vs Chelsea: Predicted lineup, confirmed team news, injury latest for Club World Cup final
arts.sum: PSG boosted by the return to fitness of star man Ousmane Dembele

arts.ttl: Maresca hopeful of Caicedo fitness to face 'best in the world' PSG
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca is hopeful that Moises Caicedo will be fit enough to take on Paris Saint-Germain, who he rates as the best team in the world, in the Club World Cup final. Asked about the 23-year-old's fitness ahead of the game, Maresca said: "Moises is such an important player for us.

arts.ttl: PSG Predicted Lineup vs. Chelsea: Unchanged From Dominant Semifinal
arts.sum: CM: Vitinha— Chelsea will seek to win the ball high up the pitch, and they must get to the beating heart of PSG’s fluid midfield if they’re to have any chance of slowing the European champions down. Here’s how PSG could line up for the Club World Cup final against Chelsea .

arts.ttl: Chelsea Predicted Lineup vs. PSG: Caicedo Fitness Could Prove Vital
arts.sum: It’s been a mightily productive summer for Chelsea thus far, but they‘ll have to ascend their toughest peak yet to claim Club World Cup glory on Sunday. Here’s the starting XI Enzo Maresca could pick for the final.
